strategy_criteria_summary: USA-listed companies reporting earnings next week, sorted by market cap. This deliberately broad Finviz screen preserves the top five visible rows; optionability, liquidity, trend, news, fundamentals, and contract quality are validated downstream.
scoring_reasons: trend alignment was clearly supportive|market/sector environment was clearly supportive|price structure was clearly supportive|best contract was long_call 2026-05-29 97
decision_reasoning: IONQ shows the strongest directional setup in the slate: +80% 20d, +51% 50d, relative strength +72% vs SPY and +59% vs sector, and volume running 47% above 20d average — a textbook momentum-into-earnings profile. Long_only permission is respected with a long call. The 49.5C 5/15 is preferred over the 51C 5/15 (closer breakeven, higher delta) and over the 5/08 52C (thin 72% spread, no greeks, expires day after earnings with no buffer). Score lands in Standard recommend range rather than Strong because IV is already bid to ~102%, news coverage is sparse (no independent catalyst confirmation), and the 1d -3.8% pullback hints at pre-print volatility.
